normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.19 - Contributions for Public Art and/or Heritage Works
scope_summary: Enables the City of Fremantle to condition certain commercial and multiple residential development within mapped Contribution Areas (Appendix 1) to contribute 1% of estimated total development cost toward public art and/or heritage works. Exempts single houses and grouped dwellings, industrial buildings, development under 1000 sq m GLA, most refurbishments, and development costing under $1,000,000. Council may redirect the contribution to heritage works on City-owned Heritage List places nearby, or waive it where equivalent-value public art is provided on or near the site.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: applicable commercial and multiple residential development in Contribution Areas
development below this GLA is exempt
development below this cost is exempt
